message:
test(theme): add comprehensive unit tests for theme module

Add 27 new tests for theme.rs covering:
- DEFAULT_STYLES validation
- Theme creation and style retrieval
- Theme inheritance
- INI parsing (basic, comments, duplicate keys, sections)
- Style definitions parsing
- ThemeStack operations (push, pop, error handling)
- Configuration roundtrip

Part of comprehensive test coverage improvement initiative.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
